title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 07 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 07 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 07 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/02/2025
Today, Dalian iron ore futures continued to fluctuate upward. The most-traded I2505 contract closed at 817 yuan/mt,up 0.86% for the day. Traders sold goods based on market trends, while steel mills purchased as needed, with inquiries decreasing compared to the past two days.
